hallucination_risk_check.reason: All fields are restatements of text present in DOC_001; no field is inferred beyond what the denial notices state.

evidence_references.quote: 기타 명시된 뇌혈관질환(I67.8)으로 진단받은 사실을 확인하였습니다
2025년 10월 16일 에서 발급 된 기타 명시된 뇌혈관질환(I678) 진단
25.09.30 두통, 어지려움으로 내원. 내원시 신경학적검사상 특이소견없음.

warnings: Document is a denial-notice pack (insurer_response) covering three separate insurer policies (삼성화재, KB손해보험, 한화손해보험) for the same 뇌혈관질환진단비 claim. No diagnosis certificate, medical record, or imaging report is present in this case, so hospital_name, treatment_period, admission_period, surgery_name are genuinely absent and omitted (schema requires >=1 evidence quote per field; none can be truthfully cited).

Schema constraint note: extracted_claim_fields only supports 8 predefined field names plus period-shaped custom fields; custom date/value-named fields fail the additionalProperties oneOf (format:date is not enforced, so a date string validates as BOTH date_field and value_field). The following additional core facts were therefore recorded here in warnings with their evidence rather than as structured fields, so they are not lost downstream: (a) imaging_date 2025-10-10 — MRI/MRA, the pivotal clinical event [DOC_001 p1 '2025.10.10(판독 2025.10.14) brain mri mra 판독상'; p3 '25.10.10 뇌MRI,MRA(TOF,미조영) 검사상'; p4 '25.10.10 두부 MRI/MRA상']; (b) claim_received_date 2025-10-20 [DOC_001 p3 '2025.10.20 ... 뇌혈관질환 ... 부지급(면책)']; (c) policy_contract_date 2023-10-16 (KB policy) [DOC_001 p3 'KB 3.5.5 오! 슬기로운간편건강보험Plus(무배당)(23.09) | : | 2023.10.16']; (d) claim_item '뇌혈관질환진단비' [DOC_001 p1 '[통합간편]뇌혈관질환 진단비 특별약관 제 3조']; (e) claim_disposition '부지급(면책) — all three insurers denied' [DOC_001 p1 '보상하여 드리지 못함'; p3 '보험금 부지급(면책) 처리됨'; p4 '지급하기 어려움'].

accident_date recorded as 2025-10-16 (한화 진단서 발급일, DOC_001 p4), used as the insured-event/diagnosis date because 삼성 p1's explicit 사고일 field is blank/redacted ('사고일: ;'). Flagged for adjuster confirmation — this is a best-available mapping, not a stated 사고일.

onset_date recorded as 2025-09-30 = the first documented visit for 두통/어지럼 (DOC_001 p3), used as the closest available symptom-onset anchor; not an explicitly stated symptom-onset date. Flagged for review.

kcd_code recorded as I67.8 (explicit on pages 1 and 4). Page 3 (KB) renders the same code as 'I67B', treated as an OCR/transcription variant of I67.8 — all three notices concern the identical 기타 명시된 뇌혈관질환 claim, so this is not raised as a P6 cross-source conflict. Noted for visibility.

No genuine cross-source conflict found across the three insurer pages: MRI/MRA date (2025.10.10) is consistent everywhere; the differing dates (visit 2025-09-30, imaging 2025-10-10, diagnosis 2025-10-16, claim receipt 2025-10-20) are distinct event types, not contradictions. Conflict ledger left clear.
